characters.name: Angada
characters.description: Angada is out into the forest he had collected some reports from the spies which he has transmitted to me.

characters.name: Bharata
characters.description: Bharata is residing at Nandigrama (and his ruling the kingdom from there), Rama's departure for Dandakaranya, and the killing of Viradha.

characters.name: Dasharatha
characters.description: A key figure in the Ramayana.

characters.name: Hanuman
characters.description: Hanuman is best of monkeys, you need not think about (the future of) Angada.

characters.name: Indrajit
characters.description: A key figure in the Ramayana.

characters.name: Janaka
characters.description: Janaka is messengers travelled for three days, rested for three nights on the way and entered the city of Ayodhya along with their horses tired.

characters.name: Kaikeyi
characters.description: Kaikeyi is inflamed against the king.

characters.name: Kausalya
characters.description: Kausalya is meditating with her eyes halfclosed.

characters.name: Kumbhakarna
characters.description: Kumbhakarna is another brother of mine.

characters.name: Lakshmana
characters.description: Lakshmana is tale of the birth of Ganga": इत्यार्षे श्रीमद्रामायणे वाल्मीकीय आदिकाव्ये बालकाण्डे षट्त्रिंशस्सर्ग:।। Thus ends the thirtysixth sarga of Balakanda of the holy Ramayana the first epic composed by sage Valmiki.

characters.name: Manthara
characters.description: Manthara is extremely unhappy.

characters.name: Maricha
characters.description: Maricha is thrown to a full distance of hundred yojanas into the surging high seas.

characters.name: Rama
characters.description: Rama is the sustainer of this world, destroyer of enemies and protector of all living beings and of the moral code.

characters.name: Ravana
characters.description: Ravana is inflicting pains on the three worlds.

characters.name: Shatrughna
characters.description: A key figure in the Ramayana.

characters.name: Sita
characters.description: Sita is and returned to deliver the good news to Rama.

characters.name: Sugriva
characters.description: Sugriva is very pleased and made a pact with Rama in the presence of Agni as witness.

characters.name: Sumitra
characters.description: A key figure in the Ramayana.

characters.name: Surpanakha
characters.description: A key figure in the Ramayana.

characters.name: Vali
characters.description: Vali is wise in his actions.

characters.name: Vasistha
characters.description: Vasistha is repeatedly  assuring  the saints saying "Do not fear, I will now destroy Viswamitra, son of Gadhi just as the Sun dispels the morning mist (they fled)".

characters.name: Vibhishana
characters.description: Vibhishana is under a white umbrella clad in white, with white garlands and white sandal paste.

locations.name: Ayodhya
locations.description: Ayodhya is best of cities, the first of the four castes (brahmins) used to worship gods and guests.

locations.name: Chitrakuta
locations.description: Chitrakuta is the right place for you to stay.

locations.name: Dandaka
locations.description: A significant location in the Ramayana.

locations.name: Godavari
locations.description: Godavari is beautiful, surrounded by trees with flowers in bloom, filled with flocks of swans, ducks and ruddy geese.

locations.name: Kishkindha
locations.description: A significant location in the Ramayana.

locations.name: Lanka
locations.description: Lanka is on the peak of a mountain surrounded by, and in the middle of, the sea.

locations.name: Mithila
locations.description: Mithila is river Mandakini flowing in the mountain, gratified her by offering meat (to eat) and sat on the mountain slope.

locations.name: Panchavati
locations.description: A significant location in the Ramayana.

locations.name: Rishyamukha
locations.description: A significant location in the Ramayana.

locations.name: Sarayu
locations.description: Sarayu is rising, filled with rain water.

events.name: Exile
events.description: Rama's journey into the forest to fulfill his father's vow.

events.name: Swayamvara
events.description: The contest for Sita's hand won by Rama.

events.name: Abduction
events.description: The seizure of Sita by the demon king Ravana.

events.name: War
events.description: The righteous battle for the liberation of Sita and the restoration of Dharma.

events.name: Coronation
events.description: The triumphant return of Rama to the throne of Ayodhya.
